summary: Iteration 35: Tested authentication system fixes (Req #14) and user invitation system (Req #15). All 24 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified working correctly. Error handling improved - shows user-friendly messages instead of 'Failed to fetch'.
passed_tests: GET /api/admin/invitations - returns invitations list with stats
POST /api/admin/invitations/bulk - returns 400 with no valid emails
UI: Login page loads with all form elements
UI: Register tab shows name, email, password fields
UI: Error handling shows 'Invalid credentials' (not 'Failed to fetch')
UI: Admin Invitations page loads with stats dashboard
UI: Single invitation form with email input and send button
UI: Bulk invitations textarea for multiple emails
UI: CSV upload section for email lists
UI: All Invitations tab shows invitation list with resend/delete actions
UI: User Dashboard has Invite a Friend feature
UI: User can send invitations from dashboard
critical_code_review_comments: public_auth.py: User registration and login endpoints properly implemented with password hashing, session management, and proper error handling
invitations.py: Full invitation system with admin single/bulk/CSV invitations and user invite feature
UserLoginPage.jsx: Improved error handling - catches 'Failed to fetch' and shows user-friendly message 'Unable to connect to server'
AdminInvitations.jsx: Complete admin UI with stats dashboard, single invite, bulk invite, CSV upload, and invitation list management
UserDashboardPage.jsx: User invite feature integrated in Referral tab with email input and send button
AdminLayout.jsx: Invitations link added to sidebar navigation
App.js: /admin/invitations route properly configured with ProtectedRoute
seed_data_creation: Created test users and invitations during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 35 verified: 1) User signup/login APIs working correctly with proper validation and error handling, 2) Admin invitations system fully functional - single invite, bulk invite, CSV upload, invitation list with resend/delete, 3) User invite feature in dashboard working, 4) Invitation verification endpoint working, 5) Error handling improved in UserLoginPage - shows user-friendly messages instead of 'Failed to fetch'. Note: Email sending may return 500 if RESEND_API_KEY not configured in production, but the invitation records are still created in the database.
